title: cenchrus pedicellatus subsp. unispiculus
intro: Cenchrus pedicellatus subsp. unispiculus, also known as the bur grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Poaceae and is commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe wounds and fight infections. The health benefits of Cenchrus pedicellatus subsp. unispiculus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
